name: RxSight Inc. Common Stock
summary: RxSight Inc. is a commercial-stage ophthalmic medical device company dedicated to improving the vision of patients following cataract surgery. The company has developed the RxSight Light Adjustable Lens (LAL), the only adjustable intraocular lens (IOL) that allows doctors to customize a patient's vision after cataract surgery. RxSight is headquartered in Aliso Viejo, California.
